page_metadata.biotools__summary:
A Hybrid Model for Predicting Pattern Recognition Receptors using Evolutionary Information.

Prediction of pattern recognition receptors.

PRRpred is a web server designed for predicting pattern Recognition Receptors (PRRs) and Non-PRRs
